subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He taketh and giveth, and He is the Taker, the Bestower, the Almighty, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو یاخذ و یعطی و هو الاخذ الباذل المقتدر القدیر یا
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @purpose; goal of creation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
